recom.name: ReCom (Recombination)
recom.description: The standard ensemble method. Merges two adjacent districts and re-splits via a random spanning tree. Fast and widely used in academic redistricting studies.
recom.best_for: General use, educational demos, quick exploration.

reversible_recom.name: Reversible ReCom
reversible_recom.description: ReCom with Metropolis-Hastings acceptance. Rejects some proposals to ensure the chain samples from a known probability distribution (detailed balance). Statistically more rigorous but ~20-30% slower.
reversible_recom.best_for: Peer-reviewed analysis, reproducible research, when statistical rigor matters.
